list.title: Wake up for Touch! Mask-isolated Tactile Alignment Learning in MLLMs

extra.desc: Splash is a mask-isolated tactile alignment learning framework that enables multimodal LLMs to acquire tactile sensing capabilities without sacrificing vision-language reasoning through selective parameter updating that prevents catastrophic forgetting.

list.title: Single-Rollout Asynchronous Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning

extra.desc: Asynchronous reinforcement learning with single-rollout optimization addresses stability issues in LLM training for complex tasks, outperforming existing methods in coding and reasoning benchmarks.

list.title: Sparse Delta Memory: Scaling the State of Linear RNNs through Sparsity

extra.desc: Sparse Delta Memory extends gated linear RNNs with sparse addressing to dramatically increase hidden state capacity for improved long-context learning and retrieval while maintaining computational efficiency.

list.title: Imagined Rollouts are Kinematic, Not Dynamic: A Diagnosis of Long-Horizon World-Model Failure

extra.desc: World models exhibit long-horizon failures due to kinematic rather than dynamic imagination, as demonstrated by measuring imagined kinematic-consistency error which remains flat while policy rewards collapse across friction boundaries.

list.title: Automating the Design of Embodied Agent Architectures

extra.desc: Automated agent architecture search demonstrates potential for improving embodied agent performance while revealing challenges related to optimization signals, local optima, and credit assignment in simulation-based training.

list.title: Accurate, Interdisciplinary and Transparent Structure-property Understanding with Deep Native Structural Reasoning

extra.desc: SciReasoner is a multimodal scientific foundation model that enables interpretable structural reasoning across proteins, molecules, and crystals by discretizing structural elements into a unified vocabulary for enhanced prediction and scientific inference.

list.title: Teaching LLMs a Low-Resource Language: Enhancing Code Completion in Pharo

extra.desc: Large language models can be adapted for low-resource programming languages through specialized training pipelines and benchmarks, achieving superior code completion performance compared to general-purpose models.

list.title: RoboDojo: A Unified Sim-and-Real Benchmark for Comprehensive Evaluation of Generalist Robot Manipulation Policies

extra.desc: RoboDojo presents a unified sim-and-real benchmark for evaluating generalist robot manipulation policies across diverse tasks and evaluation dimensions.

list.title: Dual Latent Memory in Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotic Manipulation

extra.desc: LaMem-VLA introduces a latent-memory-native framework that integrates historical experience into vision-language-action reasoning through coordinated memory components operating in the same latent space.

list.title: WildCity: A Real-World City-Scale Testbed for Rendering, Simulation, and Spatial Intelligence

extra.desc: WildCity presents a large-scale multimodal dataset for urban navigation and spatial representation, enabling research into AI systems that can perceive and reason about city-scale environments similar to human cognitive capabilities.

list.title: Infinite Worlds with Versatile Interactions

extra.desc: An advanced world modeling system with extended interaction capabilities, real-time processing, diverse interactive elements, and multi-agent behavior control for collaborative virtual environments.

list.title: Scaling Mixture-of-Experts Video Pretraining for Embodied Intelligence

extra.desc: LingBot-Video presents a DiT-based video pretraining framework with Mixture-of-Experts architecture, specialized data augmentation, and multi-dimensional reward system for embodied intelligence applications.

list.title: JD Oxygen AI Item Center (Oxygen AIIC) V1: An Industrial-Scale LLM/VLM-Centric Solution for Item Understanding, Management, and Applications

extra.desc: A large-scale industrial platform leveraging LLMs and VLMs addresses key challenges in structured item knowledge production for e-commerce, achieving high precision and throughput across billions of products.

list.title: Cross-Space Distillation: Teaching One-Step Students with Modern Diffusion Teachers

extra.desc: Cross-space distillation enables efficient knowledge transfer from high-capacity diffusion models to compact student models through a lightweight latent interface that aligns different VAE spaces.

list.title: LLM-as-a-Tutor: Policy-Aware Prompt Adaptation for Non-Verifiable RL

extra.desc: LLM-as-a-Tutor framework extends LLM role from judge to tutor by dynamically adjusting prompt difficulty through pairwise comparison and constraint addition, improving instruction-following performance in reinforcement learning.

list.title: Is One Layer Enough? Training A Single Transformer Layer Can Match Full-Parameter RL Training

extra.desc: Reinforcement learning adaptation in transformer models shows highly concentrated improvements in specific middle layers rather than uniform parameter updates across all layers.

list.title: VIBE: Voice-Induced open-ended Bias Evaluation for Large Audio-Language Models via Real-World Speech

extra.desc: Large Audio-Language Models exhibit systematic generative biases in realistic scenarios when evaluated through open-ended tasks using human-recorded speech, with bias magnitude varying significantly by task and triggered by gender and accent cues.

list.title: SceneFrom3D: Geometry-Conditioned Outdoor 3D Scene Generation via View Scheduling with Object-Level Control

extra.desc: SceneFrom3D generates 3D outdoor scenes by automatically scheduling views from input geometry and controlling object appearance and geometry adherence through identity images and geometry-adherence parameters.

list.title: RuleChef: Grounding LLM Task Knowledge in Human-Editable Rules

extra.desc: RuleChef utilizes large language models to generate and iteratively improve executable rules for NLP tasks through example-based learning and human feedback, resulting in fast and inspectable rule systems.

list.title: Attending to Multimodal Generation One Token at a Time

extra.desc: Multimodal large language models exhibit distinct attention patterns during generation, with attention to visual and textual modalities shifting based on semantic requirements, and these patterns can be leveraged to improve task performance through targeted interventions.

list.title: SWE-Review: Closing the Loop on Issue Resolution with Agentic Code Review

extra.desc: Agentic code review framework enhances AI-generated pull requests through iterative review and revision cycles, improving both code quality and issue resolution capabilities.

list.title: Rank-Then-Act: Reward-Free Control from Frame-Order Progress

list.title: SiamJEPA: On the Role of Siamese Student Encoders in JEPA

extra.desc: Siamese student encoders in JEPA models improve representation separability and training efficiency through effective regularization, outperforming single-encoder variants and MAE under limited training budgets.
